scope_note: v0.4.0 declares this baseline as shared (one truth across languages). Per-agent quality is intended to compare apples-to-apples across runs regardless of target language. OPEN QUESTION D2 (deferred to v0.5.0): shared-core agents with generalization_debt may score lower on Python runs because the prompt body cites Go idioms. Decision pending — see docs/LANGUAGE-AGNOSTIC-DECISIONS.md §D2.
note: Populated after first successful run (sdk-dragonfly-s2, 2026-04-18). Per-agent quality scores from metrics-collector (F1). Never lowered except via explicit learning-engine signoff (resets every 5 runs per settings.json baseline_reset_every_n_runs=5). Raise-only policy: improvements >10% over baseline trigger raise; regressions keep baseline and flag.

pipeline_level.computation_note: Mean of 4 primary agent quality scores (sdk-intake 1.00, sdk-design-lead 0.85, sdk-impl-lead 0.975, sdk-testing-lead 0.975). Weighted equally per metrics-collector F1.

sdk-design-lead.reference_notes: Lowest-scoring agent this run. G32/G33 tool-unavail drove 0.67 guardrail pass rate; 1 rework iter (D3→D4 devil loop) drove 0.5 rework score. Anomaly A1 filed.

sdk-impl-lead.reference_notes: 13/13 guardrails PASS, 0 rework, 6 commits, 94 exported symbols, 90.4% coverage. DEP-BUMP-UNAPPROVED escalation resolved via run-driver Option A; recovery clean.

sdk-testing-lead.reference_notes: 71 unit pass / 1 skip / 0 fail; 0 leaks/races/fuzz crashes. H8 waiver applied for allocs-per-GET (32 becomes baseline vs TPRD-declared 3; waived to 35 target with 34 regression gate).

raise_policy.description: Raise baseline only if current score exceeds baseline by >10%. Keep baseline if regression. Never lower without learning-engine reset authorization.
